ThingDef.label: Calendula Blossom
ThingDef.description: Dried calendula flowers, traditionally used to soothe irritated skin, promote healing, and reduce inflammation. Often applied in salves.

ThingDef.label: Chamomile Blossom
ThingDef.description: Dried chamomile flowers, widely known for their gentle calming effects and use in soothing herbal teas.

ThingDef.label: Echinacea Blossom
ThingDef.description: Dried echinacea flowers, traditionally used to stimulate the immune system and support resistance to infections. Often prepared as decoctions.

ThingDef.label: Lavender Blossom
ThingDef.description: Dried lavender flowers, known for their calming fragrance and use in herbal remedies.

ThingDef.label: Linden Blossom
ThingDef.description: Fragrant blossoms from the linden tree, traditionally used in herbal teas.

ThingDef.label: St. John's Wort Blossom
ThingDef.description: Bright yellow blossoms from the St. John's wort plant, valued for their use in herbal ointments and skin-soothing remedies.
